title: Woosh - Metal tea strainer 1
author: Sadiquecat
modifications: Fetched the public hq.mp3 preview from the Freesound CDN. Real foley (metal tea strainer swung through air) — picks up an airy, paper-adjacent timbre that fits the persona's 'paper-airy, not aggressive' brief better than synth whoosh. Trim to ~300ms single-direction (cut the return swing if present) and normalize to -26 dB inside apply-sfx.mjs.
